scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && npm run build:content && cp manifest.json dist/ && cp -r src/ui/screens/. dist/ui/screens
scripts.build:content: esbuild src/content/rewards-content.ts src/content/search-content.ts --bundle --outdir=dist/content --platform=browser --target=es2022 && esbuild src/ui/popup.html src/ui/onboarding.html --loader:.html=copy --outdir=dist/ui
scripts.watch: concurrently --names tsc,esbuild --prefix-colors blue,green "tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "npm run watch:content"
